items.title: Brock Bowers: Fully healthy ahead of camp
items.body_text: Bowers (knee) practiced "at full speed" during OTAs and minicamp, Ryan McFadden of ESPN reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Derek Carr: Draws interest from multiple clubs
items.body_text: Carr has been contacted by "multiple" NFL teams about a potential comeback, but he's unlikely to come out of retirement, Kevin Patra of NFL.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
